summary: Taiki has flipped bullish in his latest video, explicitly declaring that 'the bottom is in' for crypto and forecasting higher Bitcoin prices.
narrative: After spending months profiting from a bearish stance on Ethereum, his most recent analysis marks a clear pivot, arguing that the market is forming a bottom rather than continuing to crash. He supports this view by suggesting specific marginal buying catalysts can propel BTC upward and critiques standard 4-year cycle theories to validate his new optimistic outlook.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
